access_fetch.next_step: Compare the external access pattern against the worker's fetch, browser and fallback chain.

source_intake.next_step: Check whether the repo suggests a reusable source-family or intake contract for EventBaer.

parsing_extraction.next_step: Inspect whether extraction tactics improve evidence quality without weakening worker guardrails.

export_feed_api.next_step: Treat as a distribution or export pattern layered on top of the worker core.

distribution_plugin.next_step: Evaluate as an adjacent product surface, not as worker core logic.

ui_discovery_surface.next_step: Keep the discovery surface conceptually separate from the ingestion and truth core.

location_place_enrichment.next_step: Evaluate as a controlled secondary layer for place and venue intelligence.

connector_families.suggested_next_step: Check whether the repo should influence connector-family conventions, not the worker core.

source_systems_and_families.suggested_next_step: Compare the repo against EventBaer's source-system target architecture and family scaling goals.

adapter_handoff_contracts.suggested_next_step: Inspect handoff contracts into a common candidate or evidence layer.

distribution_surfaces.suggested_next_step: Treat as a product-surface signal sitting on top of the worker, not inside it.

wordpress_plugin_distribution.suggested_next_step: Review as partner/distribution leverage, separate from worker truth logic.

frontend_and_surface_design.suggested_next_step: Evaluate as an external discovery surface, not as worker architecture.

location_and_gastro_intelligence.suggested_next_step: Review against location/gastro layers and geo-validation capabilities.

secondary_enrichment_layers.suggested_next_step: Evaluate as optional enrichment behind strong evidence and governance constraints.

vertical_depth_connectors.suggested_next_step: Use to judge whether niche connectors deserve a later family slot.

risk_and_dependency_awareness.suggested_next_step: Read primarily as a risk or anti-pattern signal for EventBaer.

patternTensions.cms_distribution_plugin: Strong adjacent surface signal, but should stay outside worker core.
patternTensions.event_discovery_frontend: Discovery UX can be valuable, but it is not evidence or quality-gate architecture.
patternTensions.platform_based_place_enrichment: Useful as enrichment, but should not become the truth core.
